citations.narrative:
The facility is not following the written Program of Veterinary Care (PVC). The PVC states that 10% of adults will be fecal
tested yearly. Fecal sampling on adults was not performed in 2025. Failure to conduct sampling in accordance with a
veterinary approved schedule may result in animals to not be adequately protected against disease and/or can cause pain
and distress. Correct by ensuring all animals are sampled in accordance with the schedule approved by the Attending
Veterinarian. Correct by 6-MAY-2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the Licensee.
n

narrative:
3.13(a)(3) 
   
Veterinary care for dogs. 
The facility is not following the written Program of Veterinary Care (PVC). The PVC states that 10% of adults will be fecal 
tested yearly. Fecal sampling on adults was not performed in 2025. Failure to conduct sampling in accordance with a 
veterinary approved schedule may result in animals to not be adequately protected against disease and/or can cause pain 
and distress. Correct by ensuring all animals are sampled in accordance with the schedule approved by the Attending 
Veterinarian. Correct by 6-MAY-2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the Licensee. 
 
 n
